description: Replace the single-line README.md with a comprehensive project README under 300 lines covering architecture, quickstart, skills, philosophy, and contributing.
steps: Rewrite README.md with the following sections: (1) Title + one-line description, (2) Badge placeholder for tests/coverage, (3) What Is This paragraph explaining the self-evolving AI kernel concept, (4) Architecture text diagram showing the graph flow (init->plan->code->test->review->reflect->evolve), (5) Quick Start (3 commands: clone, dry-run, mode 3), (6) Three Execution Modes explanation (Mode 1 dry-run, Mode 2 AI reads BOOT.md, Mode 3 runner pipes to AI), (7) Skill Inventory table with all skills from _index.yaml showing name/phase/description, (8) Philosophy section mentioning Dao and Art of War principles briefly, (9) How Evolution Works (feedback loop -> reflector -> evolution engine), (10) Contributing section explaining how to add skills via write-a-skill, (11) License placeholder. Keep total under 300 lines.
Ensure the README references actual commands from runner.py (--goal, --dry-run, --ai-command, --check)
Do NOT modify any Python code in this step
acceptance_criteria: All referenced commands actually exist in runner.py
findings: README is 148 lines. All 26 skills from _index.yaml included. All CLI flags verified against runner.py. Tests pass at 98.94% coverage.
